nasb.text: And those who have turned back from following the Lord, And those who have not sought the Lord or inquired of Him.”

esv.text: those who have turned back from following the Lord, who do not seek the Lord or inquire of him.”

cnv.text: 那些轉離不跟從耶和華的， 不尋找耶和華， 也不求問他的。”

ccb.text: 铲除离弃我、不寻求我、不求问我的人。”
